div.head: The Ambassador in the United Kingdom (Winant) to the Secretary of State
div.p: 6739. Cornea 317. Today EAC discussion re Vienna airfields UK representative proposed French forces use UK controlled Schwechat Field. French representative accepted. Three delegations continued press for inclusion in reportReference is to the report which would accompany the agreement on zones of occupation for Austria of specific provision re freedom of transit for supplies and common use Vienna municipal services. Soviet representative apparently lacks specified authorization to include them but again stated his delegation considers these principles “obvious”. Next meeting EAC July 5.
Sent Dept 6739; reptd AusPolAd 15 and Paris 434, secret for Murphy.
